title: gladiolus nigromontanus
intro: Gladiolus nigromontanus, also known as Black Gladiolus or Black Calla, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as rheumatism, arthritis, and skin irritations, due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gladiolus nigromontanus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate pain and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
